fields.label: App Name
fields.description: The full name of your application (e.g., Europlast ERP)

fields.label: App Short Name
fields.description: A shorter version for the home screen (max 12 characters)

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Short description of what your app does

fields.label: Theme Color
fields.description: The color of the browser address bar and UI elements

fields.label: Background Color
fields.description: The background color of the splash screen

fields.label: Enable Biometric Lock (FaceID/TouchID)
fields.description: Require fingerprint or face scan to open the app

fields.label: Enable Haptic Feedback (Vibration)
fields.description: Vibrate the device on success, error, or interaction

fields.label: App Shortcuts (Quick Actions)
fields.description: Actions visible when long-pressing the app icon
